title: nothaphoebe pyriformis
intro: Nothaphoebe pyriformis, also known as Chinese pepper tree or Yang Li Shi, is a plant species native to the mountains of Yunnan, China. Its leaves and seeds possess medicinal properties, rich in essential oils that exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Nothaphoebe pyriformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine.
